name: Etta's Prize-Winning Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a large mixing bowl and mix at the lowest speed until blended well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients, EXCEPT the boiling water, to the bowl and beat at medium speed for two minutes.
3. Using a spoon, stir in the boiling water and mix until the batter is very thin. This will make the cake very moist.
4. Pour the batter into two greased and floured cake pans.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 50 minutes or until the sides pull away from the pan and the center springs back when touched.
6. Let cool completely before frosting.
7. Mix powdered sugar, salt, and cocoa in a large bowl on low speed.
8. Add milk all at once and mix briefly.
9. Gradually add butter, mixing just until smooth.
10. Stir in the brandy extract and vanilla.
11. Beat on high speed for at least four minutes to achieve a creamy consistency.
